AP1_eviction_sidecar_leak.notes: _evict_lru_locked now logs WARN on sidecar removal failure rather than swallowing OSError silently. RED-FAIL on test_total_bytes_accounts_for_sidecars confirmed pre-fix (delta 520 of 1150). GREEN post-fix.

AP1_total_bytes_misses_sidecars.notes: _total_bytes_locked now counts .pkl AND .pkl.sha256 so the budget figure reflects the FULL on-disk footprint; existing AP1 23-test suite still passes.

_PRE_PIPELINE_CACHE_x_content_hash_exten.notes: New _full_x_content_hash mirrors MRMR A1#8 fix + folded into _pre_pipeline_cache_key. RED-FAIL on tuple-equal collision verified pre-fix; GREEN post-fix. All 55 existing pipeline_cache_* tests still pass.

DiscoveryCache_bytes_total_helper.notes: _discovery_cache_bytes_total helper added to composite_cache.py; mirrors _mrmr_cache_bytes_total + SuiteArtefactCache._total_bytes_locked pattern. Counts .pkl + .pkl.sha256.

DiscoveryCache_SuiteArtefactCache_joint_.notes: Documented 3 options (do nothing / layer on / shared backend Protocol) + recommended Option A (do nothing) for Wave 10; Option C is the safer Wave 11+ landing pattern.

polars_lazyframe_cache_in_training_core.notes: Already documented as ARCH-DEFER in Wave 7. .lazy() call sites in training/core are single-leaf, not multi-branch graphs -- .cache() requires SuiteFrameContext restructure that needs bench before landing. Confirmed Wave 10 carries through the deferral; no code change.

inference_predict_prewarm_lru.notes: inference/predict.py loads models eagerly via joblib.load with no lazy state to prewarm. The A5#10 / cb5acc82 load_mlframe_model LRU already covers warm-prediction service callers via that path. Adding an LRU to inference.predict.read_trained_models would be a sibling fix but the caller pattern (one-shot read_trained_models per service start) makes the LRU win marginal -- defer.

PRE_PIPELINE_CACHE_LRU_atomic_put_evict.notes: _pre_pipeline_cache_set / _pre_pipeline_cache_get already hold _PRE_PIPELINE_CACHE_LOCK (threading.Lock) for the full put + evict critical section. Two parallel target fits in one process serialize cleanly; cross-key races are by design (LRU eviction is the cap-enforcement mechanism). No bug to fix.

commits.msg: fix(suite-cache): count + remove .pkl.sha256 sidecars during eviction
docs(audit): architectural proposal for DiscoveryCache + SuiteArtefactCache joint-stash

notes: All 4 active fixes ship with regression sensors that RED-FAIL pre-fix + GREEN post-fix. ARCH-DEFER items documented per IMPLEMENTATION_RULES.md. No push (per orchestrator policy). No -- no-verify. No wavelet_dwt.py touch.
